query:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS laws_positions (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  title VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL,
  description TEXT,
  pillar ENUM('LAND', 'AIR', 'WATER', 'SELF') NOT NULL,
  department VARCHAR(100),
  employment_type ENUM('w2_full_time', 'w2_part_time', 'contractor', 'apprentice', 'volunteer') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'w2_full_time',
  salary_min DECIMAL(10,2),
  salary_max DECIMAL(10,2),
  hourly_rate DECIMAL(10,2),
  requirements TEXT,
  qualifications TEXT,
  progression_path_id INT,
  status ENUM('open', 'filled', 'on_hold', 'closed') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'open',
  created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  updated_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
);

  employment_type ENUM('w2_full_time', 'w2_part_time', 'contractor', 'apprentice', 'volunteer') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'w2_full_time',
  salary_min DECIMAL(10,2),
  salary_max DECIMAL(10,2),
  hourly_rate DECIMAL(10,2),
  requirements TEXT,
  qualifications TEXT,
  progression_path_id INT,
  status ENUM('open', 'filled', 'on_hold', 'closed') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'open',
  created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  updated_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
);
